examples: Production is set to begin imminently and the shelters could reach those in need as early as this summer.
The mice weren't gnawing as quickly as they might and my condition wouldn't imminently threaten my existence.
He is expected to announce new safety measures for the industry imminently, and to extend a moratorium on new permits.
The designs of the gold, silver and bronze medals are set to be unveiled imminently.
He also warned that if matters are not resolved imminently, the Kremlin could declare a state of emergency.
